problem id: 45378f59
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND SHR(6)) XOR SHL(2)

examples:
  10100101 -> 10010110
  11010101 -> 01010101
  00100000 -> 10000000
  11001100 -> 00110000
  10101000 -> 10100010
  11100100 -> 10010010
  01110110 -> 11011001

query: 10110000
predicted answer: 11000010
